The second episode of our TAL Podcast series is now live!

In this section, theater critic, academic, writer, and director of the International Istanbul Theater Festival from 1993 to 2013, Prof. Dr. Dikmen Gürün, discusses the 1980s, the founding process of TAL, and its early works.

You can access our podcast via the link in @tal_arsiv’s profile.
